response.justification: Despite a strong full-stack and open-source background, the candidate lacks demonstrable C++ experience in industrial automation, secure coding per IEC 62443, or cloud-native platform development — core requirements for this role. Their recent work is dominated by TypeScript, Node.js, and DLang, with only a brief, outdated C++ stint at National Instruments over 9 years ago, insufficient for a senior C++ architect role.
strengths: Extensive full-stack experience across web, mobile, and embedded systems
Strong open-source contributions and technical communication skills
Proven ability to lead and mentor via workshops and community projects
concerns: No recent or substantial C++ development in the last 9+ years
Lacks exposure to industrial cybersecurity standards (IEC 62443) or MQTT/REST in automation contexts
No evidence of multi-threaded, high-performance C++ systems or message-broker architectures
